listing.agent: Jay Moxon, Barry Plant Mill Park-South Morang

rooms.name: Retreat / Study
rooms.bathroom_access: Near ensuite only via master zone

rooms.name: Dining / kitchen
rooms.storage: Tall pantry/cabinet bank, overheads, drawers, under-bench storage

rooms.name: Garage
rooms.storage: Possible wall shelving, tight around large SUV

orientation.north_arrow_interpretation: Floorplan compass indicates north is approximately toward the top-right of the floorplan image. Therefore top-facing rooms are roughly north-west, right-facing rooms are roughly north-east, bottom-facing rooms are roughly south-east, and left-facing rooms are roughly south-west.

strengths: Large 24.5m2 upstairs retreat/study is excellent for work-from-home.
Kitchen has meaningful storage, tall pantry-style cabinetry, 900mm oven, dishwasher and usable bench runs.
Both ground-floor bedrooms use the central bathroom, which is good for children/guests.
Low-maintenance alfresco suits preference better than a large backyard.
Renovated finishes appear newer than the original 1995 shell.
watchpoints: Ensuite is clean and renovated but not especially spacious.
Ground-floor bedrooms are about 10m2 each, adequate rather than generous.
Garage width of 3.4m is functional but tight for larger cars.
Photo analysis suggests strong presentation; confirm joinery, tiles, waterproofing, roof and drainage in person.
Orientation inference should be verified on-site with phone compass or sun position.
next_action: Inspect; verify orientation, natural light, ensuite size, garage width, building/pest.
